mapper.select:
SELECT t.* FROM eb_system_attach t
AND t.entid = #{entid}
AND ( (t.relation_type = 2 AND t.relation_id IN (SELECT id FROM eb_client_bill WHERE entid = #{entid} AND eid = #{eid})) OR (t.relation_type = 3 AND t.relation_id IN (SELECT id FROM eb_contract_resource WHERE entid = #{entid} AND eid = #{eid})) OR (t.relation_type = 4 AND t.relation_id = #{eid}) OR (t.relation_type = 5 AND t.relation_id IN (SELECT id FROM eb_client_follow WHERE eid = #{eid} AND deleted_at IS NULL)) OR (t.relation_type = 6 AND t.relation_id IN (SELECT id FROM eb_client_invoice WHERE entid = #{entid} AND eid = #{eid})) )
AND t.relation_type IN (2, 3, 4, 5, 6)
ORDER BY t.id DESC
